requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — PS/IEC CISPR 15 (Lighting Equipment Radio Disturbance)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——PS/IEC CISPR 15（照明设备无线电骚扰）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——PS/IEC CISPR 15（照明設備無線電騷擾）

summary.en: Pakistan does not operate a single horizontal EMC directive equivalent to the EU EMC Directive. Lighting-equipment radio-disturbance (emissions) requirements are addressed through Pakistan Standards adopting the IEC/CISPR base — typically PS/IEC CISPR 15 (limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), covering conducted emissions on mains terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions. Where EMC characteristics form part of the PSQCA conformity assessment for an in-scope lamp/luminaire, compliance evidence to the adopted CISPR 15 limits is expected. For luminaires with embedded radio (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth), radio-emissions and spectrum aspects are handled separately by the Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA) type-approval regime — see ledpk-emc-02. Products operate on a 230 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦没有相当于欧盟 EMC 指令的单一横向电磁兼容指令。照明设备无线电骚扰（发射）要求通过采纳 IEC/CISPR 基础的巴基斯坦标准处理——通常为 PS/IEC CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射。当 EMC 特性构成范围内灯/灯具 PSQCA 合格评定的一部分时，须提供符合采标 CISPR 15 限值的证据。对于嵌入无线（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）的灯具，无线电发射及频谱方面由巴基斯坦电信管理局（PTA）型号核准制度单独处理——见 ledpk-emc-02。产品在 230 V、50 Hz 电源下运行。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦沒有相當於歐盟 EMC 指令的單一橫向電磁兼容指令。照明設備無線電騷擾（發射）要求通過採納 IEC/CISPR 基礎的巴基斯坦標準處理——通常為 PS/IEC CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射。當 EMC 特性構成範圍內燈/燈具 PSQCA 合格評定的一部分時，須提供符合採標 CISPR 15 限值的證據。對於嵌入無線（Wi-Fi/藍牙）的燈具，無線電發射及頻譜方面由巴基斯坦電信管理局（PTA）型號核准制度單獨處理——見 ledpk-emc-02。產品在 230 V、50 Hz 電源下運行。

standards_or_laws: PS/IEC CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (Pakistan Standard adopting CISPR 15, administered by PSQCA)
PSQCA Act 1996 — conformity assessment for items on the PSQCA Conformity Assessment list

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For in-scope luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant categories), tested at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are issued for the China market and are not automatically recognised by PSQCA.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。对于在中国销售的范围内灯具，GB 17743 合规是 CCC 认证（对相关类别涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分，在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告为中国市场出具，不被 PSQCA 自动认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。對於在中國銷售的範圍內燈具，GB 17743 合規是 CCC 認證（對相關類別涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分，在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告為中國市場出具，不被 PSQCA 自動認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both Pakistan (PS/IEC CISPR 15) and China (GB 17743) derive from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized and an existing CISPR-15-based test report is technically reusable in substance. The gaps are recognition and structural: (1) Pakistan has no single horizontal EMC directive — EMC is addressed within PSQCA conformity assessment where applicable rather than as a stand-alone CE-style EMC DoC, so confirm whether EMC evidence is required for the specific lamp/luminaire on the current PSQCA list; (2) Chinese CCC/GB EMC reports are not automatically accepted by PSQCA — reports may need to be issued or aligned to the PS/IEC CISPR 15 edition through the conformity process; (3) for smart luminaires, radio emissions are handled by PTA, not by the general lighting-EMC route (see ledpk-emc-02). The substantive limits gap is small; the main effort is documentation/recognition through PSQCA and the importer.
gap.zh: 巴基斯坦（PS/IEC CISPR 15）与中国（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调，现有基于 CISPR 15 的检测报告在实质内容上可重用。差距在于认可与结构：（1）巴基斯坦没有单一横向 EMC 指令——EMC 在适用时纳入 PSQCA 合格评定处理，而非作为 CE 式独立 EMC 符合性声明，故请确认具体灯/灯具在现行 PSQCA 清单中是否要求 EMC 证据；（2）中国 CCC/GB EMC 报告不被 PSQCA 自动接受——报告可能须通过合格评定流程按 PS/IEC CISPR 15 版本出具或对齐；（3）对于智能灯具，无线电发射由 PTA 处理，而非一般照明 EMC 路径（见 ledpk-emc-02）。实质限值差距较小；主要工作是通过 PSQCA 及进口商进行文件/认可处理。
gap.zht: 巴基斯坦（PS/IEC CISPR 15）與中國（GB 17743）均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調，現有基於 CISPR 15 的檢測報告在實質內容上可重用。差距在於認可與結構：（1）巴基斯坦沒有單一橫向 EMC 指令——EMC 在適用時納入 PSQCA 合格評定處理，而非作為 CE 式獨立 EMC 符合性聲明，故請確認具體燈/燈具在現行 PSQCA 清單中是否要求 EMC 證據；（2）中國 CCC/GB EMC 報告不被 PSQCA 自動接受——報告可能須通過合格評定流程按 PS/IEC CISPR 15 版本出具或對齊；（3）對於智能燈具，無線電發射由 PTA 處理，而非一般照明 EMC 路徑（見 ledpk-emc-02）。實質限值差距較小；主要工作是通過 PSQCA 及進口商進行文件/認可處理。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — Pakistan has no horizontal EMC directive; lighting radio-disturbance is addressed via PS/IEC CISPR 15 within PSQCA conformity assessment where the product is in scope. Confirm whether EMC evidence is required for the specific item on the current PSQCA list.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for in-scope luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Pakistan has no EU-style horizontal EMC directive; lighting radio-disturbance (emissions) is addressed through PS/IEC CISPR 15 within PSQCA conformity assessment where the product is in scope. Limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), so a CISPR-15-based report is technically reusable, but Chinese CCC/GB reports are not automatically recognised by PSQCA. Smart luminaires with embedded radio are handled separately by PTA. Confirm EMC evidence requirements for the specific item against the current PSQCA list via the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴基斯坦没有欧盟式横向 EMC 指令；照明无线电骚扰（发射）在产品属于范围内时通过 PS/IEC CISPR 15 纳入 PSQCA 合格评定处理。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，故基于 CISPR 15 的报告在技术上可重用，但中国 CCC/GB 报告不被 PSQCA 自动认可。嵌入无线的智能灯具由 PTA 单独处理。请经进口商按现行 PSQCA 清单确认具体项目的 EMC 证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴基斯坦沒有歐盟式橫向 EMC 指令；照明無線電騷擾（發射）在產品屬於範圍內時通過 PS/IEC CISPR 15 納入 PSQCA 合格評定處理。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，故基於 CISPR 15 的報告在技術上可重用，但中國 CCC/GB 報告不被 PSQCA 自動認可。嵌入無線的智能燈具由 PTA 單獨處理。請經進口商按現行 PSQCA 清單確認具體項目的 EMC 證據要求。

requirement_topic.en: Wireless / Smart Luminaire Radio Approval — PTA Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 无线 / 智能灯具无线电核准——PTA 型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: 無線 / 智能燈具無線電核准——PTA 型號核准

summary.en: Luminaires with embedded radio functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee smart lighting) require type approval from the Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA) before they can be legally imported, sold, or operated in Pakistan. PTA Type Approval covers the radio module's operating frequency band, power, and conformity to the technical standards PTA recognises (commonly ETSI/IEC-based radio test reports). This is separate from, and additional to, PSQCA electrical-safety conformity. The 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz licence-exempt bands used by Wi-Fi/Bluetooth are regulated by PTA's frequency allocation framework; the importer typically applies for PTA type approval per device model. Smart-luminaire EMC/immunity for the embedded radio is demonstrated through the radio test reports submitted to PTA.
summary.zh: 嵌入无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 智能照明）的灯具在巴基斯坦合法进口、销售或使用前，须取得巴基斯坦电信管理局（PTA）型号核准。PTA 型号核准涵盖无线模块的工作频段、功率及对 PTA 认可技术标准的符合性（通常为基于 ETSI/IEC 的无线电检测报告）。这与 PSQCA 电气安全合格评定分离且为额外要求。Wi-Fi/蓝牙使用的 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz 免许可频段受 PTA 频率分配框架监管；通常由进口商按设备型号申请 PTA 型号核准。智能灯具嵌入无线电的 EMC/抗扰度通过提交给 PTA 的无线电检测报告证明。
summary.zht: 嵌入無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 智能照明）的燈具在巴基斯坦合法進口、銷售或使用前，須取得巴基斯坦電信管理局（PTA）型號核准。PTA 型號核准涵蓋無線模組的工作頻段、功率及對 PTA 認可技術標準的符合性（通常為基於 ETSI/IEC 的無線電檢測報告）。這與 PSQCA 電氣安全合格評定分離且為額外要求。Wi-Fi/藍牙使用的 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz 免許可頻段受 PTA 頻率分配框架監管；通常由進口商按設備型號申請 PTA 型號核准。智能燈具嵌入無線電的 EMC/抗擾度通過提交給 PTA 的無線電檢測報告證明。

standards_or_laws: Pakistan Telecommunication (Re-organisation) Act 1996 — PTA mandate for telecom/radio equipment type approval
PTA Type Approval / Technical Standards Regulations — type approval for radio-frequency devices (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/Zigbee modules)

summary.en: For wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g., smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) sold in China, SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission / State Radio Monitoring Center) type approval is required, covering the radio module's frequency, power and spurious-emission compliance. SRRC type approval is the China-domestic radio authorisation and is not recognised by PTA — a separate PTA type approval is required for the Pakistan market.
summary.zh: 对于在中国销售的无线灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED），须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会/国家无线电监测中心）型号核准，涵盖无线模块的频率、功率及杂散发射合规。SRRC 型号核准是中国境内无线电授权，不被 PTA 认可——巴基斯坦市场须另行取得 PTA 型号核准。
summary.zht: 對於在中國銷售的無線燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED），須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會/國家無線電監測中心）型號核准，涵蓋無線模組的頻率、功率及雜散發射合規。SRRC 型號核准是中國境內無線電授權，不被 PTA 認可——巴基斯坦市場須另行取得 PTA 型號核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled devices/luminaires in China (State Radio Regulation Commission)

gap.en: Both Pakistan (PTA) and China (SRRC) require a national radio type approval for wireless functionality, but the two authorisations are mutually non-recognised — an SRRC certificate does not satisfy PTA, and a separate PTA type approval must be obtained for each smart-luminaire model entering Pakistan. Practical gaps: (1) the importer/manufacturer must file a PTA type-approval application with radio test reports (often ETSI/IEC-based) for the embedded module; (2) frequency-band and transmit-power allocations recognised by PTA must be confirmed for the 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz bands used; (3) lead time and importer involvement are required — a smart luminaire cannot be legally cleared without PTA approval. Non-wireless LED luminaires do not require PTA type approval (only the PSQCA/safety route applies).
gap.zh: 巴基斯坦（PTA）与中国（SRRC）均要求对无线功能进行国家无线电型号核准，但两项授权互不认可——SRRC 证书不满足 PTA，进入巴基斯坦的每个智能灯具型号须另行取得 PTA 型号核准。实际差距：（1）进口商/制造商须向 PTA 提交带嵌入模块无线电检测报告（通常基于 ETSI/IEC）的型号核准申请；（2）须确认 PTA 对所用 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz 频段认可的频段及发射功率分配；（3）须预留时间并由进口商参与——无 PTA 核准的智能灯具无法合法清关。非无线 LED 灯具无须 PTA 型号核准（仅适用 PSQCA/安全路径）。
gap.zht: 巴基斯坦（PTA）與中國（SRRC）均要求對無線功能進行國家無線電型號核准，但兩項授權互不認可——SRRC 證書不滿足 PTA，進入巴基斯坦的每個智能燈具型號須另行取得 PTA 型號核准。實際差距：（1）進口商/製造商須向 PTA 提交帶嵌入模組無線電檢測報告（通常基於 ETSI/IEC）的型號核准申請；（2）須確認 PTA 對所用 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz 頻段認可的頻段及發射功率分配；（3）須預留時間並由進口商參與——無 PTA 核准的智能燈具無法合法清關。非無線 LED 燈具無須 PTA 型號核准（僅適用 PSQCA/安全路徑）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless products — PTA type approval required before import/sale/operation of any luminaire with embedded Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/Zigbee radio in Pakistan. Non-wireless luminaires are out of PTA scope.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless products — SRRC type approval required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China; not recognised by PTA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart/wireless LED luminaires require PTA type approval before import, sale or operation in Pakistan — this is separate from and additional to PSQCA electrical-safety conformity. China's SRRC type approval is the domestic equivalent but is not recognised by PTA, so a separate PTA approval is required per model. Non-wireless luminaires fall outside PTA scope and need only the PSQCA/safety route. Arrange PTA type approval through the Pakistan-resident importer with the embedded module's radio test reports.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智能/无线 LED 灯具在巴基斯坦进口、销售或使用前须取得 PTA 型号核准——这与 PSQCA 电气安全合格评定分离且为额外要求。中国 SRRC 型号核准是境内对应制度，但不被 PTA 认可，故每个型号须另行取得 PTA 核准。非无线灯具不在 PTA 范围内，仅需 PSQCA/安全路径。请通过巴基斯坦本地进口商、凭嵌入模块无线电检测报告安排 PTA 型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智能/無線 LED 燈具在巴基斯坦進口、銷售或使用前須取得 PTA 型號核准——這與 PSQCA 電氣安全合格評定分離且為額外要求。中國 SRRC 型號核准是境內對應制度，但不被 PTA 認可，故每個型號須另行取得 PTA 核准。非無線燈具不在 PTA 範圍內，僅需 PSQCA/安全路徑。請通過巴基斯坦本地進口商、憑嵌入模組無線電檢測報告安排 PTA 型號核准。
